TestCaseInfo.TestDescription: Verify that UUT as a peripheral pointing to network address of a different model of same device gives appropriate warning message
Verify that UUT as primary device and is not found on the network gives the appropriate error message
Verify that UUT as primary device and has invalid credentials gives the appropriate error message
Verify that UUT as secondary device and has invalid credentials gives the appropriate error message
Verify that appropriate info messages are displayed for successful deployment when UUT is used with a primary device
Verify that appropriate info messages are displayed for successful deployment when UUT is used with a primary device
Verify that appropriate info messages are displayed for successful deployment when UUT is used with a primary device
Verify that appropriate Error messages are displayed for unsuccessful deployment when UUT is used with a primary device
Verify that UUT as Peripheral Device has gives appropriate Error hardware message when unsupported on Primary
Verify that appropriate info messages are displayed for successful deployment when UUT is used as a primary
Verify that appropriate info messages are displayed for successful deploy code only when UUT is used as primary
Verify that appropriate Error messages are displayed for unsuccessful deployment and deploy code only when UUT is used as a primary
Verify hardware incompatible error when having UUT W/LL as primary specified and a different device is live
Verify hardware incompatible error when having UUT as peripheral specified and a different device is live
Verify that x35 TLP W/LL as Peripheral Device has gives appropriate Error hardware message when unsupported on Primary
Verify adding a peripheral device to x35 TLP w/LL as primary displays appropriate error message
